title: Topology-Generated Potential (TGP): Matter as the source of space
description: TGP is a scalar-field theory in which spacetime is not a fixed background but is generated by the presence of mass and energy. Each fundamental particle produces a local contribution to a shared field, whose value measures the density of generated space. The theory yields PPN parameters identical to GR, predicts lepton mass ratios from a single parameter to 0.001% precision, and derives the strong coupling constant with zero free parameters.
